basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist I and Project Technical Support II Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support-II Notification 2026 has been released on 10 June 2026 on the official website of AIIMS Bhopal. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Bhopal Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) and Project Technical Support-II Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates will be applicable as per rule
age_limit.details: All Posts: Age relaxation for SC/ST candidates will be applicable as per rule.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees in Biochemistry/ Forensic Sciences, 12th in Science + Diploma(MLT/DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + Five Years' Experience in relevant subject / field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject
qualification.details: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical): Post Graduate Degree, including the integrated PG degrees in Biochemistry/ Forensic Sciences. Project Technical Support-II: 12th in Science + Diploma(MLT/DMLT / Engineering or equivalent) + Five Years' Experience in relevant subject / field OR Three Years Graduate degree in relevant subject / field + two years' experience in relevant subject.

salary_details.details: Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical): ₹ 56000 + 20%HRA Project Technical Support-II: ₹ 20000 + 20%HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 26-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Bhopal Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is 26th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) at AIIMS Bhopal?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) at AIIMS Bhopal.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Project Technical Support-II?
faq.answer: For Project Technical Support-II, candidates need a 12th in Science with a Diploma (MLT/DMLT/Engineering or equivalent) and five years of experience, or a three-year Graduate degree with two years of experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical)?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Research Scientist-I (Non-Medical) is ₹ 56000 plus 20% House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Where is AIIMS Bhopal located?
faq.answer: AIIMS Bhopal is located in Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode is via Email.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job is contractual in nature.

faq.question: Q10. What is the date of the interview?
faq.answer: The date of the interview is 29th June 2026.
